ogTitle: Forrest Beach vs Forrestania: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forrest Beach and Forrestania.
heading: Forrest Beach vs Forrestania — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forrest Beach, Western Australia and Forrestania, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forrest Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Forrestania (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forrest Beach or Forrestania safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forrest Beach has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Forrestania scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forrest Beach scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Forrestania scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forrest Beach or Forrestania?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forrest Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
